mapper.sql: select id, app_code, app_name, app_type, api_base_url, api_key, enabled, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from agent_dify_app_config
mapper.insert: insert into agent_dify_app_config(app_code, app_name, app_type, api_base_url, api_key, enabled, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{appCode}, #{appName}, #{appType}, #{apiBaseUrl}, #{apiKey}, #{enabled}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update agent_dify_app_config set app_code = #{appCode}, app_name = #{appName}, app_type = #{appType}, api_base_url = #{apiBaseUrl}, api_key = #{apiKey}, enabled = #{enabled}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from agent_dify_app_config where id in
#{id}
